title: Chopper Runs for the Ship
description: On pages 8–11, this part focuses on chopper runs for the ship, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: Chopper Runs for the Ship. Chopper finally accepts the invitation to join Luffy, leaving Kureha and Drum Island with fear and hope mixed together. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Hey, isn't that him coming towards us?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hey, we finished setting up the ropew-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We'll be going down the mountain right now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: He came down on the rope- way here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: and those pirates were riding on that sleigh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I wonder what happened on the mountain...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What Happened to Wapol...? And is Dalton Safe!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Don't be stupid! We have to hurry up and set sail!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I... I thought I WAS GONNA DIE...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: With a good bye like that?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee hee.. now I won't have to feed a pet that I was forced to take care of!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We have to make it in time before they set sail!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: This is it...! This is the reaction I've been waiting over 30 years for...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Doc! That was real, right...? Your research was completed back then, right!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Or was that another lie as well!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We did it, Chopper! My research is complete at last!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Did you lie to 'me about that as well because you thought it'd make me sad when you died...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You told me there was no impossible for those who bear their convictions across a pirate flag!...say it one*more time, doc!

summary: This part highlights chopper runs for the ship and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
